title: juncus verticillatus var. supinus
intro: Juncus verticillatus var. supinus, also known as the sheathed rush, is a type of plant that belongs to the Juncaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its diuretic and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been shown to help alleviate conditions such as urinary tract infections and joint pain. The health benefits of the plant include its ability to promote kidney function, reduce swelling, and soothe digestive issues. In herbal preparations, Juncus verticillatus var. supinus is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
